# GameZipper Tools - Free Online Tools
> 80+ free browser-based tools. No signup, no download, no backend required.
> URL: https://tools.gamezipper.com

## Text Tools
- Case Converter: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/case.html
- Word & Character Counter: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/counter.html
- Lorem Ipsum Generator: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/lorem.html
- Text Diff Checker: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/diff.html
- Markdown Preview: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/markdown.html
- Slug Generator: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/slug.html

## Developer Tools
- JSON Formatter: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/json.html
- Base64 Encoder/Decoder: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/base64.html
- Hash Generator (MD5/SHA): https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/hash.html
- URL Encoder/Decoder: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/url.html
- Regex Tester: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/regex.html
- JWT Decoder: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/jwt.html
- Timestamp Converter: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/timestamp.html
- Cron Expression Tester: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/cron.html
- UUID Generator: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/uuid.html
- SQL Formatter: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/sql.html
- HTML Encode/Decode: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/html.html
- Chmod Calculator: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/chmod.html
- .NET Decoder: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/dotnet.html

- SVG to PNG: https://tools.gamezipper.com/image/svg.html

- Bezier Curve Editor: https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/bezier.html
- Glassmorphism Generator: https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/glassmorphism.html

- Glitch Effect Generator: https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/glitch.html
